nasb.text: Thus no inheritance shall be transferred from one tribe to another tribe, for the tribes of the sons of Israel shall each hold to his own inheritance.”

esv.text: So no inheritance shall be transferred from one tribe to another, for each of the tribes of the people of Israel shall hold on to its own inheritance.’”

cnv.text: 這樣，以色列人的產業，就不會從一個支派轉到另一個支派去；因為以色列人的支派要各自守住自己的產業。’”

ccb.text: 以色列人的产业不可从一个支派转到另一个支派，各支派必须守住本支派的产业。”
